subject: PluralSync 🔄 Email Announcements to All Users Activated
body:
Dear PluralSync Users,

As of today (2026-03-11), PluralSync will start sending essential announcement emails concerning the service and the users usage.

These emails cannot be deactivated because they're essential.

Any additional information or discussion can be had in the corresponding community spaces (see website footer for discord link).

Thank you for using PluralSync. We kindly appreciate and wish you a pleasent and useful time with it.

Kinds, PluralSync
